intro: Two scheduling conflicts need resolving: Wednesday's dentist scan (2:30–4:30 PM) overlaps with the Guy/Robbie call (3:00 PM), and Thursday's Meet Alli (9:45 AM) runs into the Manny/Manoj in-person at Farringdon (10:00 AM). Emily Jones' birthday is Friday 19 June — send a message or gift. Tuesday is completely clear, and the Saturday Shabbat dinner has no location confirmed.
